title: Pathfinder Coordinator Intake v1
description: Input envelope for the Pathfinder coordinator. Defines a veteran case routed to the Division swarm. No PII at this layer — case context is anonymized situation description only.

case_id.description: Unique case identifier. Never contains PII — opaque reference only.

session_ref.description: Optional session reference linking this intake to the originating Pathfinder session.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of intake creation.

founding_law_sha256.description: Must match the locked SHA-256 of veteran_data_sovereignty.v1.md. Coordinator fails closed on mismatch.

domains.description: Domains identified as relevant to this case. Coordinator maps each to an active Division.

case_summary.description: Anonymized situation description. No names, SSNs, addresses, or other PII. Used by coordinator to provide context to each Division.

Domain.description: Program domain. Each maps to a Division in the registry.

CrisisGate.description: Foundational (immutable) routing gate. A crisis flag blocks all other Division invocations until the crisis Division completes. This rule cannot be overridden by any caller.

flagged.description: true = crisis routing enforced. Crisis Division invoked first. All other Divisions blocked until crisis result is received.

note.description: Optional anonymized note about the nature of the crisis. No PII.

CaseConstraints.description: Mutable (reforge-eligible) routing constraints. Location, urgency, and pilot scope.

pilot_scope.description: Active pilot region. Divisions may use this to filter program availability.

enabled_divisions.description: Optional explicit Division list. If omitted, coordinator resolves from domain-to-division registry mapping.
